name: Popcorn (Crocker)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the popcorn and vegetable oil into a Dutch oven.
2. Tilt the pan to distribute the popcorn evenly.
3. Cover and cook over medium-high heat until one kernel pops.
4. Remove from heat and let stand for 1 minute.
5. Return to heat and continue cooking, shaking the pan occasionally, until the popping stops.
6. Yield: about 12 cups of popcorn; approximately 90 calories per cup.
Source: Betty Crockers Cookbook, 6th Edition
